headline: P&L exposure: ₹50.38 Cr direct GST demand (engine estimate) + ₹34.7 Cr contingent exposure (engine estimate)
what_matters: P/E compression of 0.05x is possible if the penalty is not reversed, with direct revenue at risk of ₹6.3 Cr (engine estimate) and margin erosion of 2.8 bps.

The penalty may widen ICICI Bank's bond spreads and trigger FII outflows if ESG funds or passive indices rebalance due to a governance downgrade; cost of capital could rise by 1-2 bps (engine estimate) if the event is seen as recurring.
action: Quantify exposure: ₹50.38 Cr direct GST demand (engine estimate) + ₹34.7 Cr contingent exposure (engine estimate)
Revenue at risk: ₹6.3 Cr indirect revenue at risk (engine estimate)
